name: quant
description: A Pulumi package for managing QuantCDN resources.
attribution: This Pulumi package is based on the [`quant` Terraform Provider](https://github.com/quantcdn/terraform-provider-quant).

nodejs.packageDescription: A Pulumi package for managing QuantCDN resources.
nodejs.readme:
> This provider is a derived work of the [Terraform Provider](https://github.com/quantcdn/terraform-provider-quant)
> distributed under [MPL 2.0](https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/MPL/2.0/). If you encounter a bug or missing feature,
> first check the [`pulumi-quant` repo](https://github.com/quantcdn/pulumi-quant/issues); however, if that doesn't turn up anything,
> please consult the source [`terraform-provider-quant` repo](https://github.com/quantcdn/terraform-provider-quant/issues).

python.readme:
> This provider is a derived work of the [Terraform Provider](https://github.com/quantcdn/terraform-provider-quant)
> distributed under [MPL 2.0](https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/MPL/2.0/). If you encounter a bug or missing feature,
> first check the [`pulumi-quant` repo](https://github.com/quantcdn/pulumi-quant/issues); however, if that doesn't turn up anything,
> please consult the source [`terraform-provider-quant` repo](https://github.com/quantcdn/terraform-provider-quant/issues).

baseDelayMs.description: Base delay in milliseconds for exponential backoff. Defaults to 500

baseUrl.description: The base URL for the QuantCDN API. Can also be set via QUANTCDN_BASE_URL environment variable.

bearer.description: The QuantCDN API Bearer token used to authenticate requests. Can also be set via QUANTCDN_API_TOKEN environment variable.

enableJitter.description: Whether to add random jitter to retry delays to avoid thundering herd. Defaults to true

maxDelayMs.description: Maximum delay in milliseconds for exponential backoff. Defaults to 30000 (30 seconds)

maxRetries.description: Maximum number of retry attempts for failed requests. Defaults to 3

organization.description: The QuantCDN organization machine name. Can also be set via QUANTCDN_ORGANIZATION environment variable.

requestsPerSecond.description: Maximum number of requests per second to send to the API. Defaults to 10.0

timeoutSeconds.description: HTTP client timeout in seconds for API requests. Defaults to 120 seconds to handle slow operations and potential deadlocks. Can also be set via QUANTCDN_TIMEOUT_SECONDS environment variable.

warningThresholdPercent.description: Warning threshold as a percentage of budget (0-100)

type.description: Source type: `github` or `skills.sh`

networkIntercept.description: Network intercept configuration for asset collection

description.description: Human-readable instructions for configuring this DNS record

name.description: DNS record name/host (@ for apex/root domains, subdomain name for subdomains)

type.description: DNS record type (CNAME, A, or ALIAS)

value.description: DNS record value (IP addresses for A records, domain name for CNAME/ALIAS)
DNS record value to point to

customResponseStatusCode.description: HTTP status code for custom response

applicationContainer.description: Quant Cloud application container (required when application_proxy is true)

applicationEnvironment.description: Quant Cloud application environment (required when application_proxy is true)

applicationName.description: Quant Cloud application name (required when application_proxy is true)

applicationPort.description: Quant Cloud application port (required when application_proxy is true)

applicationProxy.description: Enable Quant Cloud application proxy mode

notifyConfig.description: Notification configuration (required when notify is slack)

quantCloudSelection.description: Quant Cloud application proxy selection (populated automatically when application_proxy is enabled)

staticErrorPage.description: Static error page content (HTML) to serve on origin errors

staticErrorPageStatusCodes.description: Origin status codes that trigger static error page

notifySlackHitsRpm.description: Minimum hits per minute to trigger Slack notification
Minimum hits per minute to trigger Slack notification

staticFilePath.description: Path to the static file to serve

provider.description:
The provider type for the quant package. By default, resources use package-wide configuration
settings, however an explicit `Provider` instance may be created and passed during resource
construction to achieve fine-grained programmatic control over provider settings. See the
[documentation](https://www.pulumi.com/docs/reference/programming-model/#providers) for more information.

dnsEngaged.description: DNS engagement status. 1 indicates DNS is properly configured and engaged, 0 indicates DNS configuration is pending or incomplete.

dnsGoLiveRecords.description: DNS records required to route traffic to the CDN. These records differ based on domain type (apex vs subdomain). Present when the CDN is configured and ready to receive traffic.

dnsValidationRecords.description: DNS validation records required for SSL certificate validation. Present for domains pending certificate validation. Each record contains the CNAME information needed to validate domain ownership.
